title: Satya Nag Champa Rose Incense Sticks | x3 pack | with SAMASIA incense sticks holder | Used for Aromatherapy, Spa, Yoga, Weddings, Meditation, Healing, Positivity and Relaxation
features: Package: 3 pack of incense sticks, each 6 inches long, with a Samasia incense sticks holder. A perfect addition to your home or a great gift for a loved one.
Usage: Ideal for creating a calming atmosphere during spa sessions, weddings, healing rituals, and other special occasions. Use it to promote positivity and relaxation.
Product Type: Incense sticks, a classic and timeless way to enjoy fragrances and promote well-being.
